emails.subject: Prof. Carmona
emails.body: Prof. Carmona Yannis, I have looked at the outline of the proposed course and find that practically all the topics of the program are the staple of what we do every day. I don't think Research should spend money for this class. If we want to establish a relationship, we can easily do it by asking him to work on a research project. Vince

emails.subject: RE: Prof. Carmona
emails.body: RE: Prof. Carmona Vince, my apologies for the late response and thank you for your input. Yannis
